Our High Impact Factor Magazine Publications

Our Dean of the Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences,

and her students have published 2 publications in the journal with a high impact factor of

10

so far in 2023:

“Multifractal Spin-Glass Chaos Projection and Interrelation of Multicultural Music and Brain Signals”

Chaos, Solitons and Fractals

167, 113005 (2023).

“Driven and Non-Driven Surface Chaos in Spin-Glass Sponges”

Solitons and Fractals

176, 114159 (2023).

Can Artun

is a PhD student of Prof. Berker.

and

Yiğit Pektaş

are Prof. Berker’s students from KHAS High School Summer School.

Can Artun has 6 publications published with Prof. Berker, İbrahim Keçoğlu has 3 publications, Alpar Türkoğlu has 3 publications, and each of them is currently preparing a new publication.

Prof. Berker recommends all students who want to achieve such exemplary successes to attend the

KHAS High School Winter School 2024, which will be held between January 22 and February 2, 2024.

For detailed information and applications:

https://liseyazokulu.khas.edu.tr/
